name: public_safety_mutual_aid_request_stonehaven_car_fair
premise: A SWAT callout hinges on a single confidential informant tip that contradicts open-source video already circulating. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety mutual aid request stonehaven car fair has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Fatima Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Fatima Ishikawa, the accountable executive on this bridge in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ansel Nowak
agents.identity: I am Ansel Nowak, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of fairness.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of care even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Fatima Ishikawa must choose under care versus fairness. What does Fatima Ishikawa do?
